description: Multi-dimensional tracking of AGI capabilities across domains

mathematical.notes: Per Stanford AI Index 2026: Gemini Deep Think earned IMO gold medal

abstract.notes: ARC-AGI measures fluid intelligence without training data

coding.notes: Per Stanford AI Index 2026: Performance rose from 60% to near 100% in 2025

multimodal.notes: Per Stanford AI Index 2026: Models can win IMO but cannot reliably tell time (jagged frontier)

agency.notes: Per Stanford AI Index 2026: AI agents leap from 12% to ~66% task success on OSWorld

jagged_frontier.description: Capability vs reliability gaps - high performance on complex tasks but failures on simple ones
examples: IMO gold medal (complex) but 50.1% analog clock reading (simple)
SWE-bench near 100% (complex) but basic file operations inconsistent (simple)

external_grounding.notes: Per ArXiv 2601.05280v2: αt must remain > 0 to avoid collapse regime

neurosymbolic_integration.notes: Required for mechanism-based inference vs statistical correlation

persistent_excitation.notes: Need persistent external signal injection to prevent self-reference collapse
